text.title: Chunking Semantic — Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure: tokenize → short-circuit → embed → cosine pairs → threshold-split → size-guard.

section.title: Step 1 — Tokenize sentences
section.p: Use the language-appropriate tokenizer (NLTK punkt for English; spaCy with the right model otherwise). Cache the sentence list with positions.

section.title: Step 2 — Empty/single-sentence short-circuit
section.p: If sentences == 0, return []. If sentences == 1, return [{text, sentence_count: 1}] without calling embed. Apply r4-empty-doc-shortcircuit.

section.title: Step 3 — Embed each sentence
section.p: Call embedding_func once per sentence. Record the model name for r1-same-model compliance.

section.title: Step 4 — Adjacent cosine similarity
section.p: Compute cosine for every adjacent pair `(emb[i], emb[i+1])`. Where sim < similarity_threshold, insert a boundary after sentence i.

section.title: Step 5 — Build chunks
section.p: Group sentences between boundaries; concatenate text. Stamp metadata: embedding_model, similarity_threshold, sentence_count.

section.title: Step 6 — Size guards
section.p: Apply r3-size-guards. Sub-split chunks above max_chunk_size with recursive splitter from chunking-basics. Merge chunks below min_chunk_size with the previous chunk under the same source.
